mappings.description: Police must have a reason for arrest. If the crime is not serious, they must issue a notice (Notice of Appearance) instead of arresting immediately.
Every person has the right to file an FIR for a serious crime. If the local station refuses, you can send it to the Superintendent of Police (SP) or a Magistrate.
Cheating with the intent to cause loss of property is a crime. The victim must prove the person had bad intentions from the start.
Police must provide an 'official receipt on the spot' (Seizure Memo/Panchnama) for any property taken as evidence.

mappings.rule: The Rent Control Act (State Specific) / RERA Section 18
mappings.description: A tenant cannot be evicted without a proper court order or follow-up on specific grounds like non-payment of rent or personal use by the owner.
Consumers have the right to a refund, replacement, or compensation for defective goods or 'deficiency in service'.
A person with sufficient means must provide maintenance to their wife, children, or parents if they cannot support themselves.
Landlords in Maharashtra can increase standard rent by 4% per annum for protected tenancies. Newer buildings follow the agreed lease terms.

mappings.rule: Karnataka Shops and Commercial Establishments Act, 1961 (Section 7)
mappings.description: Daily work limit is 9 hours, weekly 48 hours. Restaurants/Shops can stay open 24/7 if they register under the 2021 notification.
Leases for 12 months or more must be registered in Delhi. Unregistered leases are not admissible as evidence in court.
Mandatory for all employees earning above 15,000 INR per month. Maximum cap is 200 INR/month.
Landlord must give 1-month notice for termination. Eviction requires specific grounds like default for 3 consecutive months.
Stamp duty for gifting properties to blood relatives is a flat 200 INR fee in Maharashtra, plus a 1% registration fee up to 30,000 INR.

mappings.rule: UP Cattle Trespass Act / Control of Nuisance Rules
mappings.description: Local municipal bodies are responsible for impounding stray cattle. Owners can be fined under the Cattle Trespass Act.
Women can work night shifts (7 PM - 6 AM) if independent transportation and security measures are provided by the employer.

mappings.rule: Telangana State Plastic Waste Management Rules
mappings.description: Use of plastic bags below 120 microns is banned. GHMC imposes spot fines from 500 to 5,000 INR.
At least 60% of the signboard must be in Kannada script, displayed at the top or prominent position.
Delhi has 3 fixed national dry days (Jan 26, Aug 15, Oct 2) plus specific festival/election days notified by the Commissioner.

mappings.rule: Cigarettes and Other Tobacco Products Act (COTPA) / Kerala Police Act
mappings.description: Smoking in public places is a fineable offense. Under COTPA, the fine is up to 200 INR. Police can also charge for public nuisance.

mappings.rule: UP Regulation of Urban Premises Tenancy Act, 2021
mappings.description: Security deposit is capped at a maximum of 2 months' rent for residential properties and 6 months for commercial.
Marriage must be registered at the local BMC ward office. Requires 3 witnesses and proof of wedding ceremony.

mappings.rule: Haryana State Pollution Control Board Orders
mappings.description: Only 'green crackers' are allowed in NCR regions like Gurgaon. Use restricted to a 2-hour window on Diwali (8 PM - 10 PM).

mappings.rule: Bihar Minimum Wages Act / Local Notification
mappings.description: Daily wages are revised semi-annually. For unskilled labor, the latest rate (Oct 2024) is approximately 418 INR/day.
Police can search vehicles without a warrant if they have 'reason to believe' an offense is happening (Prohibition check). Seizure memo is mandatory.

mappings.rule: Chennai City Municipal Corporation Act / SWM Rules
mappings.description: Littering in public places in Chennai attracts spot fines starting from 500 INR for individuals.

mappings.rule: Maharashtra Shops and Establishments Act (2017 Rules)
mappings.description: Restaurants in Pune generally must close by 1:30 AM per local police orders, though the Act allows 24/7 with specific licenses.
RTC (Pahani) records are available online via the Bhoomi Portal using survey numbers. Essential for verifying ownership.

mappings.rule: Delhi Land Revenue Act / MCD Guidelines
mappings.description: Mutation is mandatory to update tax records after property transfer. It does not prove title but is essential for municipal services.
